objective: Review the proposed BirdCLEF 2026 experiment queue and reject any step that overclaims evidence, violates role boundaries, or spends Colab A100 time before the hypothesis and validation contracts are explicit.
success_criteria: Return a pass/fail verdict on the current experiment queue.
List blocking objections before any Colab MCP execution if evidence quality is insufficient.
Explicitly separate verified facts, working assumptions, and speculative ideas.
evidence_requirements: Do not approve metric-sensitive steps unless the metric assumption is called out explicitly.
Do not approve implementation work that bypasses the architect-to-critic gate.
Do not approve training runs without a concrete reproduction command and stop condition.
stop_conditions: The queue relies on unsupported leaderboard claims.
The queue assumes Colab session availability that has not been verified.
The queue treats local prototype code as validated competition evidence.
